optimize._comment: Bounds calibrated against free values probed with slack constraints: J_T free = 17.54, Phi free = 5.81e4, J_sigma free = 0.1247 on the volume-only design (q=0.5, P=8, solidity s=1-gamma). tmax and vonmises CONFLICT physically: cooling channels near the z:8:12 heat source thin the solid ligaments and raise the stress p-norm (J_sigma free grows to 0.216 under tmax=13, and vonmises<=0.16 is then unattainable -- verified by trial runs). The feasible four-active compromise: tmax=16.0 (~9% below free) relaxed vs cooling_jacket_multi to leave stress margin, dissipation=4.0e4 (~31% below free), vonmises=0.15 (~25-30% below the stress free value of the tmax-constrained design). All FOUR constraints end ACTIVE at convergence.
